title: Integrated Intermediate Modeling Capstone · Stakeholder Model Mission
summary: A cross-agency planning group. The group needs a reproducible model portfolio that joins demand, uncertainty, constraints, and alternatives. Planned artifact: Deliver Regional Resource Modeling Portfolio with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Decompose an unfamiliar decision into linked algebraic, statistical, and computational submodels.
Compare multiple plausible models with validation evidence and complexity costs.
Propagate uncertainty through best, expected, and adverse scenarios.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
